notes: I spent about an hour searching about the game not launching because of "DirectX 12 is not supported[...]" and found that my graphics card is probably too old. gpu: AMD Radeon RX 5700 XT (radeonsi, navi10, LLVM 18.1.8, DRM 3.57, 6.10.2-arch1-1)
notes:
I went through several attempts to get it working on this machine... at first, I was experiencing an issue where the game (and only this game) had distorted colors upon starting it, all the way into its initial settings page. I uninstalled the proprietary `vulkan-amdgpu-pro`, and I then force cleared the shader cache before launching the game again. The issue with broken colors went away and then the screen was black, giving me the Talos mouse cursor, landing on the initial settings screen again.

Since other reports with AMD GPUs mentioned it, I tried switching between Proton versions, including GE, but nothing worked, including the launch option for disabling the 3D mesh shader extension. After some duck ducking, I found a few forum posts that also stemmed from having a HiDPI display with Unreal Engine games - so, I undid all of my XFCE 4K settings, turned the resolution back down to 1080p and tried again. No luck. It seems this game flatly isn't working on some AMD desktops, still.

However, it is booting up fine on a machine I have with an NVIDIA GPU (Experimental, also 1080p). It would seem that it is AMD-related.
title: The Talos Principle 2
